## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss integrating new content into the marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** Two lower-funnel guides on AI adoption in audit/advisory will form a new content cluster. This addresses a VP request for more visibility on these assets.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [**Hub-and-Spoke Model:** The guides will be the "hub" assets, with new SEO-driven articles acting as "spokes" to drive traffic and awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [**Access & Creatives:** Yasine will grant Aida HubSpot/Monday.com access. Erik will provide new ad creatives with the updated green color for side-by-side testing.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

## Topics

### New Content Integration

  - [**Problem:** A VP requested more visibility for two lower-funnel guides on AI adoption in audit/advisory.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [**Asset Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
      - [A 7-step process for AI adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
      - [A framework categorizing maturity levels (e.g., "no AI adoption" to "full AI adoption").](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
      - [Based on internal customer data.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Create a new content cluster around these guides.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [**Hubs:** The two guides.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**Spokes:** New SEO-friendly articles, informed by keyword research, to drive traffic to the guides.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Access & Creative Updates

  - [**Access:** Yasine will create a Fieldguide email for Aida to grant her HubSpot and Monday.com access.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Creatives:** Erik's designer will update existing ad assets with the new green color.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [**Goal:** Enable a direct side-by-side comparison with the original versions to measure performance impact.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Yasine:**](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [Share the two AI adoption guides with Erik and Aida.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [Create a Fieldguide email for Aida to grant HubSpot and Monday.com access.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [Deliver the updated ad creatives with the new green color.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [Review the guides and propose a timeline for the new content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/--fYNSNnc8YW3uCJfeMxusRnYhvmkn9d?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
